mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_risk_register WHERE risk_id = #{riskId} ORDER BY register_num ASC
SELECT * FROM tb_risk_register WHERE risk_id = #{riskId} AND risk_grade = #{riskGrade} ORDER BY register_num ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_risk_register WHERE risk_id = #{riskId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_risk_register ( risk_id, register_num, category_num, detail_action, danger, expected_disaster, target, curr_safety_measures, risk_grade, manage_plan, approval, approval_mail, related_instructions, created_at ) VALUES ( #{riskId}, #{registerNum}, #{categoryNum}, #{detailAction}, #{danger}, #{expectedDisaster}, #{target}, #{currSafetyMeasures}, #{riskGrade}, #{managePlan}, #{approval}, #{approvalMail}, #{relatedInstructions}, GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_risk_register SET register_num = #{registerNum}, category_num = #{categoryNum}, detail_action = #{detailAction}, danger = #{danger}, expected_disaster = #{expectedDisaster}, target = #{target}, curr_safety_measures = #{currSafetyMeasures}, risk_grade = #{riskGrade}, manage_plan = #{managePlan}, approval = #{approval}, approval_mail = #{approvalMail}, related_instructions = #{relatedInstructions} WHERE id = #{id}
